case_title: RANDI REIFF VS. HOME BOX OFFICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT THROUGH COURT CALL. DEFENDANT HOME BOX OFFICE, INC. WAS REPRESENTED BY MELISSA R. FAURE--LITIGATION ADMINISTRATIVE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REIFF, RANDI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOME BOX OFFICE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REIFF, RANDI AS TO DEFENDANT HOME BOX OFFICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HOME BOX OFFICE, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REIFF, RANDI AS TO DEFENDANT HOME BOX OFFICE, INC.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF REIFF, RANDI
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-17-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOME BOX OFFICE, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT HOME BOX OFFICE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.
